---
title: "SIFSIX-3-Ni for Direct Air Capture"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

<style>
#title-block-header {
  display: none;
}

.pub-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 100px 1fr 280px;
  gap: 30px;
  align-items: start;
  padding: 40px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
}

.pub-number {
  font-size: 1.6em;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #222;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.pub-url-link {
  font-size: 0.85em;
  color: #0366d6;
  text-decoration: none;
  display: block;
}

.pub-cite-col {
  font-size: 1.05em;
  line-height: 1.5;
  color: #333;
}

.pub-title-text {
  font-weight: bold;
  font-size: 1.15em;
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
  color: #000;
}

.me-underline {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

.pub-image-col img {
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  border: 1px solid #eee;
  border-radius: 4px;
}

@media (max-width: 800px) {
  .pub-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    gap: 20px;
  }
}
</style>

::: {.pub-grid}

::: {.pub-index-col}
<div class="pub-number">1</div>
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1021/jacs.3c11503" class="pub-url-link" target="_blank">
journal URL <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i>
</a>
:::

::: {.pub-cite-col}
<span class="pub-title-text">Probing Structural Transformations and Degradation Mechanisms by Direct Observation in SIFSIX-3-Ni for Direct Air Capture</span>

M. L. Barsoum, <span class="me-underline">J. Hofmann</span>, H. Xie, Z. Chen, S. M. Vornholt, R. dos Reis, N. Burns, S. Kycia, K. W. Chapman, V. P. Dravid, and O. K. Farha

*J. Am. Chem. Soc.* **2024**, *146*, 10, 6557–6565.

<small>(#M.L.B. and J.H. contributed equally)</small>
:::

::: {.pub-image-col}
![](SIFSIX_TOC.jpeg)
:::

:::
